subtitle: Swingline Stapler, 747 Iconic Desktop
overview:
America’s #1 manual desktop stapler is simple, accurate, reliable and strong. Metal construction, inner rail and positive locking latch makes this stapler especially durable, minimizes jamming and keeps staples aligned. The 747 model staples 25 sheets at a time and opens flat for tacking ability to post papers instantly to a bulletin board or similar tackable surface. This stapler also has a reversible anvil for pinning. By turning the anvil you can create a pin staple with legs that point out so it can be removed without a staple remover, and without ripping papers. Backed by a limited lifetime warranty and 100% Performance Guarantee when used with Swingline Premium Staples.

overview:
Around Stapler
*** Features *** The staple head rotates, so you can staple vertically or horizontally as desired. Binds up to around 10 pages.
*** How to Load Staples *** Open the cover, pull down the magazine and load the staples. Staples sold separately. Holds 50 NO. 10 staples.

When stapling, make sure that you press straight down. When rotating the staple head, always make sure that it is turned 90 degrees before stapling.

title: Stapler Value Pack, 360 Degree Rotating Stapler, 25-Sheet Capacity, Anti-Skid Base, Easy-to-Use and Load, Portable Durable Metal Full Size Desktop Stapler – Includes 10,000 Staples and Staple Remover
subtitle: Stapler Value Pack, 360 Degree
overview:
Frustrated at how often your average stapler gets jammed up?
THIS IS WHERE OUR ICONIC STAPLER COMES IN – LET US TELL YOU WHY!
360 DEGREE ROTARY STAPLER – OUT OF THE ORDINARY
For a start, our stapler exudes a sleek and premium outlook. The exterior is made out of the highest quality ABS and stainless steel that will last you a lifetime! 
Not only fashionable, its innovative function is like no other! Featuring a body that supports 360 DEGREE ROTATION, it can meet multiple horizontal binding needs up to a depth of 70mm that ordinary staples just can’t.
3 STAPLING POSITIONS – INNOVATIVE & PRACTICAL
There are 3 grooves on the stainless steel saddle stitch. The middle groove provides a permanent clinch style where the binding is firm and closed. The grooves on both sides are designed to achieve a temporary clinch style where staple can be easily removed.
STAPLE PULLER REMOVER
Designed to give you an ergonomic grip, it removes both standard and mini-sized staples. Its smooth metal hinge or pointed metal tips / fangs easily slide under staples, which allows you to firmly grasp and pull – without ripping or tearing papers during the process.
You’re all set! – GET YOURS NOW.



SPECIFICATION: 

Stapler size: 140 x 60 x 60mm / 5.51” x 2.36” x 2.36” (L x W x H)
Material: ABS + stainless steel
Stapler color: Black
Stapler Remover size: 55 x 42 x 37mm / 2.17” x 1.65” x 1.46” (L x W x H)
Staples type: 24/6

PACKAGE: 

1 x Black Rotary Stapler
1 x Black Staple Remover
1000 x Silver Staples

title: Swingline Stapler, Desktop Stapler, 20 Sheet Capacity, White/Gold (64701)
subtitle: Swingline Stapler, Desktop Stapler, 20
overview:
The sturdy Swingline 646 Durable Desk Stapler is reliable, with a metal base and a plastic top for long-lasting service. Attractive stapler with a gold, metallic base and chic, white plastic top adds style to any desktop. It’s designed for desktop use, but is also great for tacking and pinning paper. This high quality stapler holds a full strip of 210 staples. A helpful low-staple indicator alerts you when it’s time for a refill. Stapler securely fastens up to 20 sheets of paper and works best with ¼ leg length standard sized Swingline S.F. 4 Premium Staples. It adapts easily for tacking paper onto a bulletin board or other vertical surface—simply pull open the top and you’re ready. This stapler also produces pointed staples for pinning paper: just reverse the anvil by pushing and rotating the adjustable knob at the bottom of the stapler, and then press. Contoured design couples with a smooth finish to enhance comfort..
DURABLE STAPLER – This desktop stapler is designed for long-term durability and consistent performance, constructed with a strong metal base and a sturdy plastic top.
SLEEK & SOPHISTICATED – Say goodbye to boring. Attractive stapler with a gold, metallic base and chic, white plastic top adds style to any desktop.
DESIGNED FOR DESKTOP – This stapler is intended for desktop use. It holds a full strip of 210 staples. A helpful low-staple indicator lets you know when it’s time for a refill.

title: Novus B4fc re+New Flat Clinch Stapler, 50 Sheet Capacity, Made of 80% Recycled Plastic, German Engineered, Staple|Pin|Tack, 25 Yr. Warranty, Black re+New Special Edition (020-1933)
subtitle: Novus B4fc re+New Flat Clinch
overview:
The Novus B4fc re+new Flat Clinch Stapler offers smooth, hassle-free stapling of up to 50 sheets. It’s made from 80% recycled plastic and features a dual staple guide for durability and superior jam protection. Perfect for office use, each staple is pressed flat to offer 30% more filing space. This premium German-engineered stapler is ideal for quality-conscious office professionals. FLAT CLINCH- By pressing the staple legs flat, filed documents take up 30% less storage space. ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY- The Novus re+new series combines sustainability with design and function. This re+new stapler contains up to 95% recycled consumer plastics. CORPORATE RESPONSIBILITY- In addition to an increase in recyclable materials and a reduction in raw materials, Novus focuses on an overall reduction in energy consumption, CO2 emissions, and chemicals in manufacturing to reduce environmental impact.
[ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY] — Made from 80% recycled plastic
